description_long: This is a modern accent chair featuring a distinctive Z-shaped wooden frame with a natural light wood finish. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a bold red and black buffalo plaid fabric, providing a striking visual contrast to the wood. The chair has thick, cushioned padding on both the seat and backrest, ensuring comfort. The armrests are integrated into the angular frame, creating a geometric and contemporary silhouette. The back of the chair reveals vertical wooden slats supporting the backrest cushion. This design is both stylish and functional, suitable for urban interiors such as lofts, cafes, or waiting areas.
description: A modern chair with a Z-shaped light wood frame and red-black plaid cushioned upholstery, featuring integrated armrests and a bold, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, thick plaid cushions, and the angular wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the Z-shaped frame and the depth of the seat and backrest cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical wooden slats supporting the backrest and the plaid upholstery.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the angular frame and cushion thickness.
